content.en:
Somewhere on the boundary of the ancient spring district.

Qingxuan Daozu received a notification from the Ancient Spring Xuanlou that she had successfully become a servant of a full member.

Moreover, the status of a full member who can have a servant is not ordinary.

It's also an opportunity for her.

"I hope this master has a better temperament!"

Qingxuan Dao Ancestor said secretly.

Some of the full-fledged members have a bad temper and do not treat their servants as human beings, and even when they encounter dangerous tasks, they will send them to death.

If you meet such a master, you will be really unlucky.

But fortunately, there are very few such formal members, and most of the formal members still have good temperaments, so these half-step sevenfold ancestors are willing to become servants of the official members, seeking a future and support.

Airplanes!

Qingxuan Daozu soon returned to the Guquan Xuanlou, and under the arrangement of the Guquan Xuanlou, he met with Ye Tian.

......

"I've seen the Endless Dao Ancestor!"

Qingxuan Daozu said respectfully.

Ye Tian was looking at Qingxuan Dao Ancestor, and Qing Xuan Dao Ancestor was also looking at Ye Tian.

"From today onwards, you will follow me!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

Qingxuan Dao Ancestor answered.

She has no choice, Ye Tian chose her, she must follow Ye Tian, unless Ye Tian doesn't want her as a servant, she can leave.

But at this moment, Qingxuan Daozu was very excited.

Ye Tian is a half-step sevenfold ancestor, what does this mean, she knows very well, that is, Ye Tian's potential is very high, otherwise the average half-step sevenfold ancestor would have no servants!

At the very least, you have to be a sevenfold ancestor to have a half-step eightfold ancestor-level servant.

"My master should have a great hope of condensing the Ninefold Life Dao Flower!"

Qingxuan Daozu thought secretly.

If this master becomes a Ninefold Origin Ancestor in the future, she will have a backer of a Ninefold Ancestor, and if she wants to become an Eightfold Ancestor, it should be very simple!

My luck this time is really good!

"Qingxuan Dao Ancestor, do you know that there are places or treasures in the Nine-Fold Building that can have the effect of raising the life level of the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor above the 8.5 life level?"

Ye Tian asked.

Although he could look for it slowly, Qingxuan Daozu had been in the Nine-Story Building for a long time after all, and he should know a lot about the Nine-Story Building.

Therefore, he wanted to learn from Qingxuan Daozu.

"Life level 8.5 or above!"

Qingxuan Daozu knew that his master was afraid that his life level was already above 8.5, otherwise he would not ask this question.

So, Qingxuan Dao Ancestor said: "Lord Endless Dao Ancestor, I don't know much about these, but I do know several treasures, which have an improvement effect on life level 8.5 and above, such as the treasure land of the Nine-Story Building, the Purgatory Fire Realm. However, the Purgatory Fire Realm is very dangerous, even the most powerful half-step Sevenfold Ancestor can't bear it, and it needs a lot of life-saving things to survive there. And after being burned by the flames of the Purgatory Fire Realm, the level of life will be raised. I heard that there was a half-step sevenfold ancestor who had reached a life level of 8.8 and had spent tens of trillions of epochs in the Purgatory Fire Realm, and finally raised his life level to more than 9. "

"Tens of trillions of epochs ???"

Ye Tian gasped, this is too much time, his cultivation time has not even been a fraction of this yet!

If it took such a long time to raise the level of life, he was not willing.

However, judging from Qingxuan Daozu's tone, he thinks that such an improvement is worth it.

"That's right, many half-step sevenfold ancestor immortals can't raise their life level above 9, for them, what is a mere tens of trillions of epochs? If they can raise their life level above 9, no amount of time is worth it!"

Subsequently, Qingxuan Daozu said a few more treasures, but they were all treasures that were difficult to obtain.

However, one of them can be exchanged for points from the nine-story building, but unfortunately there are too many points needed, enough tens of thousands!

Ye Tian can't be exchanged now, and just a treasure may not have a good effect.

"At present, it seems that it is the most cost-effective to go to the Purgatory Fire Realm, only 1200 points!" Ye Tian muttered.

However, if you go to the Purgatory Fire Realm, if you can't hold on to coming out, you will still need 1200 points to enter next time.

Therefore, the longer you persist in the Purgatory Fire Realm, it is worth it, otherwise it will be a waste of points.

Therefore, every half-step sevenfold ancestor who entered the Purgatory Fire Realm would only go to the Purgatory Fire Realm after he was fully prepared.

"Life-saving things, just prepare a large number of Primordial Ancient Beads, it's best to collect some Sevenfold Primordial Ancient Beads at the level of Primordial Ancestors!"

But Ye Tian also knew very well that even if it was the Primordial Ancient Bead, he couldn't use it all the time to save his life, and his body would still be unable to bear it in the later stage.

However, he did not have to worry.

He has a lot of life-preserving Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowments, and the effect of absorbing the Primordial Ancient Beads will be even better.

In addition, he also has the flame type Yuan Dao Ancestral Fu, which should be able to better absorb the power of the Purgatory Fire Realm, so as to improve the life level faster.

But what the specific situation is, you have to go to the Purgatory Fire Realm to find out!

In the following years, after Ye Tian asked Qingxuan Daozu to collect enough Primordial Ancient Beads for him, he spent 1,200 points to go to the Purgatory Fire Realm.

......

Purgatory Fire Realm.

This is a special treasure place, completely controlled by the Nine-Story Building, and outsiders cannot enter here, and the Nine-Story Building is also very tightly protected here.

At this time, there were many half-step sevenfold ancestors in the Purgatory Fire Realm, and there were also some sevenfold ancestors.

As for the Yae Origin Ancestor, it is not here, after all, it has no effect on the Eighte Origin Ancestor at all.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the Purgatory Fire Realm.

Rumble!!!

The incomparably terrifying flames swept in all around, burning Ye Tian's body, this kind of burning was enough to turn any half-step sevenfold ancestor into ashes.

Ye Tian's life level is very high, and his strength is also very strong, but he still can't withstand the flames here.

Immediately, he urged the Immortal Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu, and then with the help of the Primordial Ancient Bead, he quickly recovered his body, and then resisted.

"If the Immortal Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu plus the Primordial Ancient Bead is added, the environment here will not have much impact on me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But this is only the outermost flame of the Purgatory Fire Realm, and the effect is not very good.

However, those half-step sevenfold ancestors only dared to stay here, not to go deeper.

"I have so many life-saving Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowments, and with the Primordial Ancient Beads, I can go deep into the Purgatory Fire Realm, so that I can have a better effect, if I raise my life level here, the effect is too poor!"

So, Ye Tian went deep into the Purgatory Fire Realm.

The Nine-Story Building divides the flame power of the Purgatory Fire Realm into five major areas, white, red, blue, purple, and gold, among which the White Flame area has the worst effect and the worst power, while the Golden Flame area has the best effect.

However, even the top-notch Sevenfold Ancestor did not dare to enter the Golden Flame Region rashly, otherwise he would be burned to ashes, and many life-saving things might not be able to withstand it.

Soon, Ye Tian left the White Flame Area and came to the Red Flame Area, feeling that the Red Flame Area was not good, and came to the Blue Flame Area again.
